title: reseda phyteuma subsp. media
intro: Reseda phyteuma subsp. media, also known as the prickly reseda, is a plant species in the borage family native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
